name: bookmark-site
description: Connect Codex to a private, self-hosted Bookmark Site.

interface.shortDescription: Use your private Bookmark Site from Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to your own Bookmark Site deployment, then search, read, and ask questions across your saved sources through its read-only MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Connect or update my private Bookmark Site.
Show the latest items in my Bookmark Site.
Search my Bookmark Site for something I saved.
